title: Flaky German Yogurt Crumble
description: A floral and flaky German yogurt crumble dish featuring full fat yogurt, sauteed with herbs for a unique twist on a classic keto-friendly weeknight meal.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, blend together the Full Fat Greek Yogurt and minced garlic until smooth.
Add fresh herbs to the yogurt mixture and stir gently to combine. Season with black pepper and olive oil for added flavor.
If desired, sprinkle almond meal or gluten-free flour over the top of the yogurt mixture to achieve a slightly crumbly texture. Stir well to incorporate evenly.
Place the bowl in the freezer for about 30 minutes. This helps in achieving a flaky consistency when served.
